encounter.reason: Post-readmission follow-up and wound clearance after laparoscopic appendectomy complicated by surgical site infection
encounter.location: Heartland Surgical Associates, 8901 West Dodge Road, Suite 210, Omaha, NE 68114

conditions.name: surgical site infection, post-procedural, right lower quadrant port site
status post laparoscopic appendectomy for perforated appendicitis

document_references.author: Dr. Marcus Okonkwo
document_references.description: Post-readmission follow-up note documenting the patient's recovery 10 days after second discharge and 24 days after laparoscopic appendectomy for perforated appendicitis. Documents subjective well-being, normal vitals, complete wound healing by secondary intention at all port sites, completion of antibiotic course, resolution of surgical site infection, and clearance plan including return to full work duties by February 19, 2026.

document_references.author: Dr. Marcus Okonkwo
document_references.description: Formal wound assessment documenting complete healing of the right lower quadrant port site by secondary intention, with healthy flat scar tissue and no signs of residual or recurrent infection. Also documents fully healed umbilical and left lower quadrant port site incisions with no hernia defects. Clearance from wound care.

document_references.author: Dr. Marcus Okonkwo
document_references.description: Letter authorizing return to full work duties including heavy lifting, effective February 19, 2026. Documents that the patient has been on light duty in a supervisory role since approximately one week prior and is now cleared for progressive return to full physical activity.
